factors.label: Coordination delay
factors.interpretation: Missed turns, slow responses, or players not seeing an available useful move.

factors.label: Hoarding surplus
factors.xLabel: probability of holding surplus foreign cards
factors.interpretation: Players keep resources they do not need, reducing circulation and slowing later settlement.

factors.label: Last-ingredient reluctance
factors.xLabel: probability of withholding scarce own vouchers
factors.interpretation: Owners hesitate to release the last visible or low-count ingredient cards even when another cook needs them.

factors.label: Common Basket thinness
factors.xLabel: probability of skipping a useful basket swap
factors.interpretation: The public pool is visible but underused, forcing slower bilateral coordination.
